findings.description: The class name `ConnectionFactorySupport` is referenced in the s1 section content but is absent from the s1 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: ConnectionFactorySupportサブクラスのプロパティ`statementFactory`に、本機能が提供するCacheableStatementFactoryを設定する。

findings.description: The log format string `cache entry removed` appears in the s3 event table but is missing from the s3 hints array. All other log format strings are present.
findings.source_evidence: キャッシュに対して削除要求が発生した場合: cache entry removed: key=[<SQL ID>]

findings.description: Section s1 consolidates three distinct == subsections (クエリ結果キャッシュ実装クラスの登録, StatementFactory実装クラスの差し替え, SQL ID毎のキャッシュ設定) into one knowledge section. Combined content with multiple XML code blocks and property tables substantially exceeds 2000 characters while source h3 (== level) headings exist, satisfying the V3 split criterion.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains three == headings under キャッシュ機能を有効にする設定方法, each with XML examples and configuration details.
